title: tillandsia coarctata
intro: Tillandsia coarctata, also known as the dwarf air plant, is a species of air plant that belongs to the bromeliad family and is native to South America. This epiphytic plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties that can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Tillandsia coarctata include soothing sore throats, reducing inflammation, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to aid in digestion, relieve stress, and promote overall well-being.
